headline: USD poised to benefit from fragmenting supply chains in Q2
summary: Investing.com -- The U.S. dollar could stage a rally in the second quarter as the conflict between the U.S. and Iran, which is also an economic war, reshapes global supply chains and exposes vulnerabilities across energy-dependent economies, according to Macquarie.

raw.headline: USD poised to benefit from fragmenting supply chains in Q2

headline: Ceasefire without relief: oil disruptions persist, Barclays warns
summary: Investing.com -- The U.S. extension of the ceasefire with Iran has done little to restore oil and gas flows through the Strait of Hormuz, with Barclays warning that the scale of disruption remains significantly underpriced in both oil futures and energy equities.
